description: Input schema for Inworld TTS 1.5 Max.

text.description: Text to convert to speech (max 2,000 characters).
text.title: Text

voice_id.description: Voice ID to use. List available voices via the Inworld platform.
voice_id.title: Voice Id

language.description: BCP-47 language tag (e.g. 'en-US', 'fr-FR', 'ja-JP'). Auto-detected if omitted. 15 languages supported.
language.title: Language

temperature.description: Controls variability (0-2). Lower = more consistent, higher = more varied.
temperature.title: Temperature

title: AppInput
